title: CORE Phase Definition Schema
description: Schema for constitutional phase declarations in .intent/phases/*.yaml. Per ADR-074 D6: validates that every phase YAML declares its phase_type, description, authority, and a non-empty failure_modes mapping from failure-class names to response-strategy values drawn from enums.json#/definitions/failure_mode. Per ADR-074 D5, failure-class names are per-phase YAML keys (not a global closed enum in v1); the schema constrains values only.

failure_modes.description: Map from failure-class name (per-phase, governor-authored per ADR-074 D5) to response-strategy value drawn from the failure_mode enum. Map shape, not list, so the class-to-strategy binding is declarative.
